Frequently Asked Questions

Quick answers to common questions

How do I verify the purity of your peptides?

Every product comes with a Certificate of Analysis (COA) from third-party HPLC testing. You can view the COA on each product page.

What is your shipping policy?

We offer free shipping on orders over $150. Standard shipping takes 2-3 business days. Express overnight available for $25.

Do you offer wholesale pricing?

Yes! We offer competitive wholesale pricing for research institutions and bulk orders. Contact our sales team for a quote.

How should I store the peptides?

All lyophilized peptides should be stored at -20°C (-4°F) for maximum stability. Once reconstituted, use within 30 days.
